categories.name: OAuth Token Refresh
categories.description: Zoho 1-hour token vs Mailchimp API key longevity

categories.name: Duplicate Email Handling
categories.description: Zoho allows duplicate emails. Mailchimp does not.

categories.name: Field Volume & Priority
categories.description: Zoho hundreds of fields vs Mailchimp 80 merge tag limit

mappings.toolAValue: Zoho OAuth token: expires in 60 minutes
mappings.notes: Stale Zoho token causes silent 401 failures mid-sync. Refresh token lasts 1 year or until revoked.
mappings.fixStrategy: Implement proactive refresh at 50 min. Queue sync operations during token refresh window.

mappings.toolAValue: Multiple Zoho contacts with same email
mappings.notes: Last-synced contact wins by default. No merge logic — data loss risk.
mappings.fixStrategy: Define priority rule: most recently modified Zoho contact wins. Log duplicate conflicts.

mappings.toolBValue: Mailchimp: max 80 merge tags per audience
mappings.notes: Excess fields are silently dropped. No error when merge tag limit exceeded.
mappings.fixStrategy: Prioritize 20-30 high-value fields. Document excluded fields.

errors.fixSummary: Proactive refresh at 50 minutes. Retry on 401.

errors.errorName: Zoho Fields Dropped at Mailchimp 80 Merge Tag Limit
errors.description: Fields beyond 80th merge tag silently not synced.
errors.fixSummary: Prioritize fields. Check merge tag count.
